svg.text: Custody log is the single source of truth (a checkout can record a user AND their destination) · actor logged on every event · roles: user / storekeeper / it_admin · dashed = external (web app)
derived from newest custody event per device
Custody "to" side: at least one of to_user_id / to_location_id (both allowed → who has it + where). current_location_id in the view = to_location_id of newest event.
